content: Whiterun Guard 2: Damn, this weather's almost as hot as the barmaid's ass today. I swear I can feel Dibella's blessing radiating from the sun. Have you noticed how the mead flows better when it's warm? Makes me wish we weren't stuck here guarding instead of... other activities. Whiterun Guard: Tell me about it. My armor's practically melting off in this heat. Though I can't complain about the view. Have you seen the new recruit from Riverwood? She's got more curves than a mountain pass. Bet she knows how to handle a sword...

Whiterun Guard: By the Divines, Lydia, you're barely wearing more than a damned slave girl in that getup. What would Jarl Balgruuf say if he saw you parading around the city like some Dibella worshipper at an orgy? Lydia: Watch your tongue, fool. This is the armor of a proud Nord warrior, not some Imperial's plaything. At least I don't betray my people by wearing their enemy's colors while pretending to serve Whiterun. MJR appreciates my loyalty and my... assets. Unlike you, he knows a real woman when he sees one. Whiterun Guard: Loyalty? You're just another slut chasing the Dragonborn's cock because he can shout fire and absorb dragon souls.
Whiterun Guard: So you get your rocks off by pretending to be a proper warrior while showing off every inch of skin you've got. Real classy. armor. Lydia: armor
